name: ghost-protocol-v2-quality-gates
description: Quality gate scripts for Ghost Protocol v2

scripts.lint: ruff check tests core/health_audit.py scripts/verify_live_health.py scripts/verify_health_audit.py scripts/check_error_signatures.py
scripts.type-check: mypy --config-file mypy.ini tests core/health_audit.py scripts/verify_live_health.py scripts/verify_health_audit.py scripts/check_error_signatures.py
scripts.gate:full: npm run lint && npm run type-check && npm run test && npm run build && npm run test:e2e && npm run verify:live && npm run verify:health-audit
